content:
Yday night she didnt sleep again and was constantly talking to herself.

Doctor said when she does this give her extra Abilify and Remeron; i gave her but still whole night she couldnt sleep. Then at 6AM today morning she got a little aggressive and started saying really bad things about Krishang, my 14 year old nephew. Also got Aviana, our daugther, in the conversation. And said i am leaving with Avi to india.

At that point in time, I gave her 2 tablets of Zyprexa and since then she is a little calmer. She was trying to do some house chores, but i told her to rest either in the backyard or in the bedroom. She walked for more than 30 / 40 mins and after my meeting i finally told her pls go and sleep. I have put her to sleep but lets see.
